changelog: FOUNDATION — Infrastructura pentru rapoarte profesionale (nicio schimbare vizibila pana la v12.76).

NOU: benchmarks.js — baza de date de referinte publice (INSP, ECDC, WHO AWaRe, ESAC-Net, ANMCS, Ord. 1101) cu 20+ benchmark-uri pentru IAAM, PPS, ATB, Autocontrol, Deseuri, Audituri. Plus glosar ~45 abrevieri (IPC, germeni, infectii, dispozitive, ATB, metodologie, organizatii, sectii).

NOU: Helpers Word in rapoarte.js — wChartImage (Chart.js→PNG→ImageRun in docx), wSparkline (Unicode ▁▂▃▄▅▆▇█), wKpiCard, wBenchmarkPanel, wCorrelationInsight, wDataRecommendation, wExecutiveSummary, wAbbreviationsGlossary.

NOU: Rich analysis in analysis.js — analyzeIAAMRich, analyzeAutocontrolRich, findCorrelations (cross-module: IAAM×Autocontrol, IAAM×Audituri, MDR×ATB), rankFailingAuditItems. Return bogat cu kpis/trends/benchmarks/insights pentru grafice + narrative.
Urmeaza v12.76 cu primul raport transformat (Raport Anual complet, cu 6-8 grafice embedded, benchmarks inline, corelatii, recomandari data-driven).
